Given "<", derives the other comparison operators

History:
2023 Mar 01     J. Carter          V1.0--Initial version

subprograms.code: function "<=" (Left : in T; Right : in T) return Boolean
function "="  (Left : in T; Right : in T) return Boolean
function ">"  (Left : in T; Right : in T) return Boolean
function ">=" (Left : in T; Right : in T) return Boolean

formals.code: function "<" (Left : in T; Right : in T) return Boolean
